title: OpenAI: ChatGPT Enterprise/EDU - June 19, 2026
description:
OpenAI: ChatGPT Enterprise/EDU - June 19, 2026

Release date: Jun 19, 2026 · First seen: Jun 23, 2026

ChatGPT Enterprise/EDU adds Slack connector actions in ChatGPT, letting workspaces enable supported tasks like joining channels, creating reminders, uploading files, and updating Slack profiles alongside search. Admins can manage available actions with Action control.

title: Anthropic: Claude Code - 2.1.183
description:
Anthropic: Claude Code - 2.1.183

It also fixes a wide range of bugs across subagents, TUI rendering, tmux, notifications, and hooks.

title: OpenAI: ChatGPT - June 22, 2026
description:
OpenAI: ChatGPT - June 22, 2026

Release date: Jun 22, 2026 · First seen: Jun 23, 2026

ChatGPT now handles large pastes as attachments for Free and Go users, automatically converting pastes over 10k characters to keep the composer cleaner and protect context. Users can move the content back into the text field anytime, and the attachment threshold has been raised.
